nodes.name: iconify_gen.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that searches, previews, and generates iOS-ready icon assets from the Iconify icon library, supporting both PNG rasterization and SVG output in a standardized directory structure.
nodes.languageNotes: Bash script with six top-level functions covering the full generate-icon workflow: argument validation, usage display, icon search, collection listing, preview, and generation.

nodes.name: require_value
nodes.summary: Validates that a required CLI argument value is present, printing usage and exiting on failure.

nodes.name: usage
nodes.summary: Prints the full CLI help message describing available subcommands, flags, and examples for iconify_gen.sh.

nodes.name: search_icons
nodes.summary: Queries the Iconify API for icons matching a search term and optional collection filter, formatting results for display.

nodes.name: list_collections
nodes.summary: Fetches and displays a filtered list of available Iconify collections from the remote API.

nodes.name: preview_icon
nodes.summary: Downloads and displays a single SVG icon from Iconify for preview before generation.

nodes.name: generate_icon
nodes.summary: Downloads an SVG icon from Iconify and generates iOS AppIcon-compatible PNG sizes at multiple resolutions, outputting into a structured assets directory.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the iOS Icon Generator workflow, guiding agents to search Iconify collections and produce properly-sized iOS app icons using the bundled iconify_gen.sh script.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the Iterative Retrieval Pattern — a four-phase (Dispatch, Evaluate, Refine, Loop) approach to progressively gathering just enough context for a task rather than loading everything upfront.
